---
title: "Assessing Large Language Models for Stabilizing Numerical Expressions in Scientific Software"
date: 2026-04-08"
year: 2026
pdf: ""
venue: "Arxiv 2026"
award: ""
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.04854"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Tien Nguyen
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Muhammad Ali Gulzar
categories:
  - Manuscript
description: ""
---
